title: Titration of Lentivirus

Woodchuck hepatitis virus post-regulatory element [WPRE]:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8chbr","text":"        WPRE FP- GGCACTGACAATTCCGTGGT,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c8n0a","text":"        WPRE RP-AGGGACGTAGCAGAAGGACG","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"23kko","text":"        WPRE probe- 5´Fam-ACGTCCTTTCCATGGCTGCTCGC -Tamra-3´.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b4kn0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ok64","text":"b.    Human albumin was used as a standard:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cctpr","text":"        ALB FP-5´-TGAAACATACGTTCCCAAAGAGTTT-3´","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dh85j","text":"        ALB RP 5´-CTCTCCTTCTCAGAAAGTGTGCATAT-3´","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3o02q","text":"        ALB probe- 5´Fam-TGCTGAAACATTCACCTTCCATGCAGA-Tamra-3´.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"20m5b","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fngjt","text":"c.    LV 2 for LV not using WPRE:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2glhb","text":"        LV2 FP;   5´-ACTTGAAAGCGAAAGGGAAAC-3´","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bf36i","text":"        LV2RP;  5´CACCCATCTCTCTCCTTCTAGCC-3´","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9vtda","text":"        LV2 PROBE ; 5´.FAM AGCTCTCTCGACGCAGGACTCGGC-TAMRA-3´","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"657is","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"65pn1","text":"Relative quantification of WPRE/LV2 and albumin content compared to reference batch [virus of known titre] was performed by the ΔΔCT method.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: When aliqouting the virus, prepare 1 vial with 6 μl for titration. This vial must go through one cycle of freeze / thaw before titration and if you want to titer in conjunction with aliqouting you can put the vials on dry-ice for a bit.
Seed cells in 6 well plates seed 100,000 cells - in 2 mL - 3 mL, media . For each virus - 3x wells are required. Plate 6x additional wells for control and reference batch.
Dilute the virus 1:10 before adding it to the cells [ 54 µL, PBS + 6 µL, virus ].
Then add 3 μl, 10 μl and 30 μl of the diluted virus to the cells [corresponding to 0.3 μl, 1 μl and 3 μl undiluted virus].
Leave for 72:00:00 before DNA is isolated.
Look at the cells under the microscope and compare with control.
Remove media and wash 1x with 1 mL, PBS [Use 1000 ul pipette and don´t add the PBS directly on the cells to avoid flushing them off].
Add 500 µL, trypsin and leave for a few minutes in the incubator.
After incubation with trypsin, add 500 µL, PBS or Media and transfer cells to 1.5 ml tubes.
Spin down at 300 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Remove supernatant with a pipette to not disturb the pellet.
Make a master mix of 200 µL, PBS + 20 µL, Protein K per sample and resuspend the pellet in 220 µL, mastermix .
Add 200 µL, Buffer AL [w/o ethanol] and mix thoroughly by vortexing.

Bring samples to DNA isolation room and follow the instructions from the Qiagen DNeasy Protocol: Purification of Total DNA from Animal Blood or Cells [Spin-Column Protocol]. Start with incubation at 56 °C for 00:10:00 and then move directly to step 3.
creator: Laura Castilla-Vallmanya
